latin: Nuntius de unguento novo gloriabatur: 'sexaginta centesimis temporis, omni tempore operatur.' collegae eius confusi inter se aspexerunt.

questions.prompt: What is the newsman boasting about?

questions.target: 60% of the time, every time is contradictory
choices: 60% of the time, every time is contradictory

translation: The newsman was boasting about a new cologne: 'Sixty percent of the time, it works every time.' His confused colleagues looked at each other.
